name: Lemon Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. Duncan Hines Lemon Supreme Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients and mix until soft and pliable.
2. Dust hands with powdered sugar.
3. Roll 1 tablespoon of dough into a ball and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 8 minutes—no longer.
5. Cool on a rack.
